creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've made some revisions to your patch.  Let me know if you have any
questions or objections; I will await your feedback before committing
anything.

Also, I think that the caveats you note in pkg-message warrant an
entrying in ports/UPDATING; please include that in your follow-up.

Thanks,
-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
